What I have noticed over the years reading/watching “experts” is there are truth seekers and then there are those pushing a position - especially when it comes to health, food and faith. I look for the truth seekers.

In the physical world, an important point when looking for info on how something will affect YOU - be it caffeine, alcohol, palio, carnivore, nnEMF (from “DE” to RF) remember . . . It depends (on YOU). Yes there are general principles that will apply to most - but specifically for YOU . . . It depends. So many variable's mostly in you but also your environment (how things work together).

I have done caffeine and alcohol for a season (I like the flavors) and gone without for a season, I’ve been a vegetarian (2 years), I’ve eaten carnivore - I don’t notice any difference. Fasting (3 days, 10 days, now mostly intermittent) - works for me. Light, water, magnetism - works for me. Prayer/meditation - works for me. I have also noticed that the most ignorant people on any given subject were an “expert” in another.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-07-13T22:27:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-337112>

Many things are the way they are today because of a modern day “horses’ ass” . . . But many are because of ancient horses’ asses” . . .

The US standard railroad gauge (distance between the rails) is 4 feet, 8.5 inches. That's an exceedingly odd number. Why was that gauge used?
Well, because that's the way they built them in England, and English engineers designed the first US railroads. Why did the English build them like that?
Because the first rail lines were built by the same people who built the wagon tramways, and that's the gauge they used. So, why did 'they' use that gauge then?
Because the people who built the tramways used the same jigs and tools that they had used for building wagons, which used that same wheel spacing. Why did the wagons have that particular odd wheel spacing?
Well, if they tried to use any other spacing, the wagon wheels would break more often on some of the old, long distance roads in England . You see, that's the spacing of the wheel ruts. So who built those old rutted roads?
Imperial Rome built the first long distance roads in Europe (including England ) for their legions. Those roads have been used ever since.
And what about the ruts in the roads?
Roman war chariots formed the initial ruts, which everyone else had to match or run the risk of destroying their wagon wheels. Since the chariots were made for Imperial Rome , they were all alike in the matter of wheel spacing. Therefore the United States standard railroad gauge of 4 feet, 8.5 inches is derived from the original specifications for an Imperial Roman war chariot. Bureaucracies live forever.
So the next time you are handed a specification/procedure/process and wonder 'What horse's ass came up with this?', you may be exactly right. Imperial Roman army chariots were made just wide enough to accommodate the rear ends of two war horses. (Two horses' asses.)
￼
Now, the twist to the story:
When you see a Space Shuttle sitting on its launch pad, there are two big booster rockets attached to the sides of the main fuel tank. These are solid rocket boosters, or SRBs. The SRBs are made by Thiokol at their factory in Utah . The engineers who designed the SRBs would have preferred to make them a bit fatter, but the SRBs had to be shipped by train from the factory to the launch site. The railroad line from the factory happens to run through a tunnel in the mountains, and the SRBs had to fit through that tunnel. The tunnel is slightly wider than the railroad track, and the railroad track, as you now know, is about as wide as two horses' behinds.
So, a major Space Shuttle design feature, of what is arguably the world's most advanced transportation system, was determined over two thousand years ago by the width of a horse's ass.
And you thought being a horse's ass wasn't important? Ancient horse's asses control almost everything.

Let me contact you when I am in the "mud pit". Right now I am in El Salvador, at the beach, soaking in the sun and earthing and so on. And I could not order your device anyway until I am back. I figured out to install the Zapp/Unzapp for the phones, and that's good enough for here in El Salvador. I will order the measurement devices and ask for input when I am in a position to measure, and also look for options, including EMFSafe. I do have a couple of practical questions.

Does the RF meter give me frequency and intensity readings? Or does it have ranges of bands that I select for which it reads the power density?

What would be an example source of nnEMF source that is not captured by your safe and sound RF meter (reading 200 MHz to 8 GHz), but captured by the Gaussmeter (13 Hz to 75 kHz), given that the bad source is not the DC magnetic field, but an AC field? Sounds like power lines?

What about electric field fluctuations (which may be caused by magnetic field fluctuations and vice versa) between 75 kHz and 200 MHz that is not captured? Is this band not of concern because power lines / train / metro are in the Gaussmeter regime and the Wifi/Bluetooth/Cell is in the RF regime, butwe don't have much nnEMF polution in the 75 kHz to 200 MHz polution?

A lab for electron microscopy is typically shielded with a Faraday cage. They put in copper or some other metal mesh all round the room, and then have to make sure that all the metal, the door / opening, floor and outlets are connected to the same ground. And then internet is fed in through ethernet. I supposed such an option is too expensive to do for living space, but if everyone was conscientious about nnEMF, in principle for any new construction, bedrooms could be shielded in this way to generate a sanctuary? I guess one difficulty would be doors and windows, but the doors could have a metal mesh and good seal, and same for window, the blinds or the insect mesh could be easily connected to the faraday cage. So even for a new construction home, it would be more of a DIY thing, unless we want to pay exorbitant money.

What amazes me is that we figured out for sensitive measurements that any nnEMF is harmful. So we go to great length mitigating it, even if it costs a huge amount of money. But for humans, nah, nnEMF could not have an effect cause we are not as sophisticated of a machine compared to an electron microscope.

If you want to buy a UVB/UVA lamp for humans, it's impossible to do so for a reasonable price. But you can easily get that in the reptile store for very little money. For reptiles we figured out that without UVB/UVA and red light that is alternated between day and night, they become ill and die or they simply won't move. But nah, that's for reptiles. Human's could not be as sensitive as reptiles are. Another source is Halloween stores: you can get blacklight.

If you want to buy all-spectrum LED light for humans the occasions we need to be indoors, it's impossible if we want 300 nm to 900 nm covered. But it's pretty standard accessory for plant growers. Look for plant light in Amazon, and then it's totally possible. We figured out that tomatoes, basil, and all sorts of plants don't grow much indoors without the full solar spectrum. But nah, that's for plants. Humans could not be possibly as sophisticated as plants.

This whole idea that we have our own solar panel, our own live batteries, are run by DC electric current, and if there is AC, run by a cascade of molecular clock is so logical, but so crazy that it did not enter our general consciousness, textbooks, scientific papers, .... nothing. The Rockefellers and the likes were pretty crazy successful in brainwashing the majority of humankind.

### Anthony Smith — 2024-07-31T22:24:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-337891>

> Anthony would an adapter like this work to an external ground if you don't have that luxury of the grounded plug? Or does it cause more issues?

Yes you can add an external ground seeing as a 2 pin plug has no ground even when plugged in to an outlet that’s a ground. A 3 pin plug (with a ground) plugged into an outlet will only be grounded IF there is a ground in the wiring as part of that circuit.

Most of the outlets I tested in EL Salvador, even though they were 3 holes (the round one being for the ground) there was NO ground on the circuit. So in this case even if a cord has a ground pin, the device is not grounded if the circuit or the building has no ground . . . Then an external ground can be brought in.

Only way to know if there is a ground is to check with a circuit tester Like this.

> [pfedorow said:](/goto/post?id=337889)

What I have noticed with many clients over the years is that some (EMF mitigation) techniques help some people that are very sick get less sick BUT these same techniques do not help “less sick” get well. They can even make people who are basically “well” feel worse. Less nnEMF is alway better BUT the best way to go about it can change. What works for one may not work for another depending where you are on the journey.

For example . . . I find it interesting that the same people who tell us to get rid of metal bed frames and metal coils (sometimes to buy their $10,000 cotton and organic foam beds, which may be VERY good by themselves) are ok with metallic grounding sheets or pads which are then connected by wire to the house electrical system or a 50ft antenna. This may help very sick people get less sick but we have MANY reports of “well” people having bad results with in home grounding. Ground outside in Nature with your body in direct contact with the Earth.

I share this because there may be people here on the Forum that are grounding themselves inside and still having problems. Ground appliances NOT you. Grounding inside make you part of the circuit and the 60Hz (50hz) AC fields now have a path of least resistance - through YOU - to ground. At night TURN OFF the AC circuits in your bedroom, get up in the morning and watch the sun rise with your body directly in contact with the Earth . . . It is called “EARTHING” for a reason.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-02-25T02:31:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-347259>

**\*\*\* Public service announcement \*\*\***
Taking body voltage readings correctly. Understand how the equipment works.
Your body contains water, it is conducive, it acts as an antenna attracting (absorbing) nnEMF.
With a body voltage meter we can measuring the amount of 60Hz (50Hz) AC electric field that is being induced into your body.
This is done by giving the electric field a path of least resistance to ground THOUGH THE METER, in so doing we can measure it.
IF however part of your body is touching the ground, SOME or ALL the field will go to ground not through the meter. When this happens the meter is giving you a false LOW reading.
If you touch a grounded device (ie fridge or grounding pad) the body voltage meter may drop to “0” ZERO - not because the field is no longer there affecting your body but because it is going to ground through the grounded device NOT the meter.
If you were in 2,000mV before you are still in 2,000mV but you are now part of the circuit and the 2,000mV is now going through to ground.

Being in a 60Hz (50Hz) AC electric field (and not grounded) is like being in a bath tub.
Being in a 60Hz (50Hz) AC electric field (and GROUNDED) is like being under a waterfall . . .

Taking a body voltage reading lying on the bed is ok . . . IF there are no grounding pads or sheets etc. BUT
if standing - you must wear insulated (non grounding) shoes and
if sitting - a non metallic chair with shoes on or with feet off the ground.

Have fun measuring. For more info: [www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse](http://www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse) (follow grounding and measure links).

### Anthony Smith — 2025-02-25T22:54:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-347294>

**Addendum to the Body Voltage meter PSA above.**
The body voltage meter works by giving the electric field being induced into your body a path to ground and measuring it as it does. If you touch a grounding pad the meter may go to zero. The field did not go away, it did not change, it is still going through your body, but though the ground pad NOT the meter. In fact your exposure may have increased (See above).

People like analogies to help in understanding things.
Imagine the lights are on and you have a light meter. You get a reading. You cover the light meter and it now reads zero. Did the lights go out?
You have an RF meter and measure the WiFi, you put the RF meter in a Faraday bag, it now reads zero. Do you still have RF/WiFi?

Don’t be fooled by marketing tricks (or ignorant people) to buy products that do not reduce your nnEMF exposure. This goes for “harmonizers”, “neutralizers”, shungite, copper coils and crystals - if your phone still works - you still have RF going through your body. If the lights and coffee pot still work - you still have 60Hz (50Hz) AC fields affecting you. [Www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse](http://Www.LiveEMFSafe.com/kruse)

### Anthony Smith — 2025-02-26T23:08:10+0200

**Another Public Service announcement:**
Not all electric and magnetic fields are the same.
Those from 60Hz (50Hz) AC circuits are not good and should be avoided or reduced.
Those from a DC circuit (battery) do not have the same negative effect (for most people).
In fact static magnets can be very beneficial - think Magnetico bed.
I can get a 300mG reading from a magnetic massage device with manual spinning magnets.

When you measure it is not just the reading that matters, what is the frequency and the source?
Earths DC electric/magnetic field (direct body contact) is required for life and optimum health.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-03-06T00:00:34+0200

**New research** has uncovered the heaviest element yet known to science. The new element is “Governmentium”. It has one neutron, 25 assistant neutrons, 88 deputy neutrons and 198 assist deputy neutrons, giving it an atomic mass of three on twelve. These three on twelve particles are held together by forces called “Morons” which are surrounded by vast quantities of leftin like particles called “Pions”.

Since governmentium has no electrons or protons, it is inert, however it can be detected because it impedes every reaction with which it comes into contact. A tiny amount of Governmentium can cause a reaction normally taking less than a second to take from four days to four years to complete. Governmentium has a normal half-life of 2-6 years. It does not decay but instead undergoes a re-organization in which a portion of the assistant neutrons and deputy neutrons exchange places, in fact, Governmentium mass will actually increase overtime since each re-organization will cause more morons to become neutrons, forming “isodopes”.

This characteristic of moron promotion leads some scientists to believe that Governmentium is formed whenever morons reach a critical concentration. This hypothetical quantity is referred to as critical morass. When catalyzed with money, Governmentium becomes “Administradium”, an element that radiates just as much energy as Governmentium since it has half as many peons but twice as many morons. All of the money is consumed in the exchange, and no other by products are produced.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-03-15T23:55:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-348697>

I loved reading Jack’s recent post about the wedding shoes.
I realize the point was to illustrate a way a person’s influence and presence can live on after death.
As a wedding photographer, who photographed multiple hundreds of weddings, it caused a flood of memories.
My thing was - moments, people, places, things and events. AND I will photograph your wedding/event in such a way that you can relive it again and again in the years to come.

There are many ways people can live on, they did and do in my photographs.
My observation though is, not that many people are truly living NOW.

Other than all the usual bride and groom photos, the special ones (to me) were the mother with the bride getting ready, the father walking the bride down the isle and the father daughter dance. I would love to have photographed that bride putting on those shoes from her mother.

One of most memorable moments in hundreds of weddings was one where the bride had told me there would be no father daughter dance because her father was older and did not dance, in fact had never danced. I asked her if she wanted to dance with her father? She replied it made no difference what she wanted, it was not an option. I pressed her, do you want to dance with him? She was a little agitated but said yes of course - but . . . I said no ”buts” - leave it to me.

He was an older gentleman and had been shuffling around but sat most of the reception, he was barely alive. When it came to that time, I had spoken to the DJ, he had been given the same NO father/daughter dance instructions. I approached the father. This is your daughter’s wedding and she would like to dance with you. He refused. I looked him in the face and said - SIR, this is your daughter’s wedding and she wants to dance with her father, now get up. I took his hand and he got up. I walked him out to where his daughter was on the dance floor. She was shocked, the room was shocked, everything stopped. The bride was crying, all the family was crying, then the DJ played the song.

In the course of that song I watched that man loose 10+ years and come back to life.

We all want to live forever - but - how many are willing to live NOW?

1\. Yes. Using a Safe and Sound Pro2 I have measured 99%+ reduction inside the canopy. SYB is our supplier, SYB was started by Dr Martin Blank and his son - quality products.
2\. Metallic surfaces reflect RF. We recommend turning off the electric circuits so there is no 60Hz AC field to be adsorbed by the canopy, so no grounding is necessary. SYB do not recommend grounding either.
3\. I don’t understand your question - “would it be more”. But I cannot speak to using with a Magnetico anyway.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-04-01T01:43:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-349804>

5G is a technology not a frequency. What material to use to mitigate depends on the frequency. Most 5G is below 8GHz and canopies work just fine. A very few places have 5G over 20GHz but it can’t get through your walls. I suggest you use what is tried and true rather than experimenting but up to you. There is a $1,000 meter to read 20-40GHz but after that measuring gets VERY expensive.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-04-01T19:44:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-349865>

> [Sajid Mahmood said:](/goto/post?id=349855)
>
> 1\. If any Radio Frequencies leak into a bed canopy, will the radio frequencies continuously keep bouncing around inside, & make things worse? Is there any truth to this or is this just a myth?
>
> 2\. Why don’t you recommend grounding bed canopies? Is there anything wrong with grounding them? Can it become more of a problem?
>
> 3\. Are there any 5G frequencies that are between 9GHz to 19GHz? If yes, which meter is used to measure or test 5G frequencies between 9GHz to 19GHz?

1- If you have any gap in a canopy (or Faraday room, container etc) RF can get in and bounce around. As long as it is completely closed, nothing can get in so nothing is bouncing around.
2- If you turn off the circuits to the room there is no need to ground a canopy. The canopy works to reflect RF because of the metallic content, if you ground the canopy to the house ground it is then attached to 1/2 to 1 mile of wires AND if there are ANY ground affects where you live the canopy is part of that “circuit” as well. Most people will be in contact with the canopy at least as they move in bed throughout the night. Why would you want contact with one MILE of wires? Even a wire out the window is an antenna.
3- I am not aware of what or who uses 9GHz -19GHz if anyone (unless military). I am not aware of a meter commercially available for these frequencies.

Have you heard of Google? It is amazing what info is available there!

The fact you ask this question about isolating the ground tells me you do not understand house wiring, or the electrical code And have no business trying to fix this problem, which is caused by wiring errors in the home. All the neutrals on a neutral bus and grounds on a ground bus - which are joined- is normal wiring (in the US).

CALL AN ELECTRICIAN before someone gets electrocuted. Immediately stop using the grounding pads/sheets and turn off the bedroom circuits at night.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-06-07T21:12:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-354227>

It is not about food it is about light, water and magnetism. It is about decentralization and being close to nature for optimum results.

Gates Apeel coating product is approved to be used on Organic Foods. It was approved to be used in organic foods even though it contains mono- and diglycerid which are explicitly banned to be used on organic foods by the USDA

“Regulators approved appeal as a fungicide, not a coating. A technical loophole that slides it under organic certification rules.

Mono- and diglycerides are only permitted in organic production for drum drying, not as coatings, Organipeel’s use as a coating violates USDA regulations. The coating cannot be washed off completely, which might bother consumers who like to control what stays on their food. So while you think you're buying clean, untouched food, you're actually getting produce treated with compounds that critics warn may leave behind residues potentially - arsenic, lead, cadmium, and palladium.

Some might also wonder about the production process of the coating. While Apeel states it’s safe, the use of solvents like heptane or ethyl acetate during manufacturing has raised questions among cautious consumers, even if these are not present in harmful amounts in the final product.

The ingredient list is mostly undisclosed . . . can Bill Gates and the FDA be trusted? What else is in Apeel?

From Grok - The claim about Apeel's Organipeel being approved for organic produce is true, as it's listed by the Organic Materials Review Institute for use as a fungicide, not a coating. This classification may allow it to bypass restrictions on mono- and diglycerides, which are banned as coatings in organic production. The ingredient list is mostly undisclosed, with only 0.66% citric acid confirmed, raising transparency concerns. Claims of heavy metal residues lack regulatory backing and remain speculative. While Apeel asserts safety, some stores avoid it due to consumer skepticism. The fungicide loophole and lack of full disclosure fuel debate, but the product meets current organic standards.

nnEMF (non-native/man made electromagnetic fields) = blue light + Radio Frequency (RF) + Magnetic fields + electric fields.
How loaded is your nnEMF camel?
The negative effects of nnEMF are cumulative (they add up over time).
We are significantly more sensitive to these effects after sun set (at night).
Which is why reducing night time nnEMF is the biggest bang for the buck - that said you still need to reduce daytime exposure.
Measure ALL the nnEMF in your space. Invest in meters.
NO ALAN (Artifical Light At Night)
RF - turn off WiFi (you should be hard wired), no phone by your bed.
The “elephant in the room” for many (most) people is the 60Hz (50Hz) AC (alternating current) Electric fields (including “DE”) and magnetic fields from the wires in the walls, floor and ceiling.
Simply turning off these circuits at your electrical panel (at night) can reduce your daily harmful nnEMF exposure by 70%+/-
Add to this some simple daytime mitigation and you could have unloaded “your camel” by 85% +/- .
100% reduction in the modern world is a mythical number but getting close is doable.
Measure ALL your nnEMF, be informed and empowered to take control and reduce your load.
As with any subject there different schools of thought on the best way to do all this BUT . . .
Anything is better than nothing - do something.

The national debt is the total of the government’s accumulated budget deficits, minus any surpluses.

As of today, the U.S. national debt has surpassed $36+ trillion and, according to projections from the [Congressional Budget Office,](https://www.cbo.gov/publication/59233) could reach $50 trillion within the next decade.

The United States owes foreign investors $8.5 trillion of its national debt.
We “owe” $4.6T to the Federal Reserve but we are owed $3T+/- by other countries (see below).
America’s government (We the People) is is dept to “We the People” - $20T+/-

The graphic illustrates the foreign holders of U.S. national debt using data from the [U.S. Department of the Treasury](https://ticdata.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/slt_table5.html), as of December 2024.

<table style="width: 100%"><tbody><tr><td>Country</td><td>December 2024 (USD)</td></tr><tr><td>Japan</td><td>$1T</td></tr><tr><td>China</td><td>$759B</td></tr><tr><td>UK</td><td>$723B</td></tr><tr><td>Luxembourg</td><td>$424B</td></tr><tr><td>Cayman Islands</td><td>$419B</td></tr><tr><td>Canada</td><td>$379B</td></tr><tr><td>Belgium</td><td>$375B</td></tr><tr><td>Ireland</td><td>$336B</td></tr><tr><td>France</td><td>$332B</td></tr><tr><td>Switzerland</td><td>$289B</td></tr><tr><td>Taiwan</td><td>$282B</td></tr><tr><td>Hong Kong</td><td>$255B</td></tr><tr><td>Singapore</td><td>$249B</td></tr></tbody></table>

That said America is owed over $3 Trillion by other countries. Top 7 countries that owe American money:

Canada - $380B
UK - $342B
Cayman Islands (UK) $302B
Australia - $157B
Netherlands - $154B
France - $146B
Japan - $131B

Any Accountants here?
If I write myself a check for $1m, am I in debt?
If I borrow $1M but I am also owed $1M, am I in debt?
If I borrow $35T but my assets are $35T+ . . . Am I in debt?

Asking for 330B “friends” . . .

Well, and inside the US there are multiple IOU's. For example, the Treasury sold bonds to regional banks at low interest rates, which have then decreased in value as interest rates have gone up. The Fed then extended a loan program to these regionals to send a lifeline for these toxic assets. And there is an estimate of $1T in under water commercial real estate loans currently held by regional banks. Many of these commercial properties are trading in the 60-70% of loan value. Somewhere someone is taking a haircut

### Anthony Smith — 2025-07-15T04:10:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anthony-smith-emf-posts-photos-for-family-friends.28747/post-356333>

> [Szen said:](/goto/post?id=356330)
>
> If I may ask, what was the spark from your life experiences that led you to realize what your passion is, and in turn link to the careers you've had over the years like in photography and EMFSafe?
>
> The advice often given is to "follow your passion", which implies that it's a singular thing that people would already know they are driven to chase and care about, rather than throwing darts and then deciding to commit to what sticks.

“Following your passion” may be a singular thing but it can be applied/manifest in a thousand ways.
From an early age (7) I knew I was here to help people. It was/is my purpose and so my passion.

Both sets of Grandparents in their later years were in the hospitality industry - they bought hotels.
I chose to go to Hotel School - yes because I needed to do something to make a living BUT also it is a great industry to help people.
After Hotel School, before settling down, I was going to travel (back pack) the world. To discover it . . . And myself.
But my Dad was a pilot for British Airways and I applied to British Airways (BA) to be a flight attendant, so I would have a job to come back to (if necessary). 6 weeks later I was in training at BA and did end up traveling the world but on a 747 and saying in 4 Star hotels.
Being a flight attendant was a great way to help people be comfortable during a very stressful time (stuck in an aluminum tube, 5 miles up in the air cramped in with 300+/- people they did not know or care about).

After BA I came to the US for a few months to work in the hotel/catering industry before going back to the UK to open a wine bar with a friend.
40+ years later I am still here. I met a girl, got married and ended up being a wedding photographer in Texas - helping people on one of the most important (and stressful) days of their lives. When you have four sets of parents (due to divorce and remarriages) to have good photos, everyone needed to be happy. I helped coordinate most of my weddings making sure everything went smoothly and everyone was happy.

After that I moved to Oregon to be in ministry and helped people with their mental, emotional, physical and spiritual issues.
On the physical side I was into health and nutrition (since collage), red light therapy, which led into EMF mitigation.
Now I help people to measure their environment, understand it, mitigate it so they can mend more quickly . . . And get more sun.

What is your purpose? What floats your boat? What excites you? What is your passion? If you don’t know - #1 find it.
Whatever it is there are people making a living doing it. For many (most) it is just a job BUT if it your passion, people will seek you out because you will do it far better and therefore you will end up making more money.

nnEMF (non-native ElectroMagnetic Fields) include:
Electric Fields - from power lines including the wires in your walls, floor and ceiling and almost everything plugged into them.
Magnetic Fields - from spinning motors fans etc and power lines
Radio Frequency - from cell phones, WiFi, Bluetooth, microwave ovens, radio/TV/phone towers etc.

Mitigating ALL nnEMF as much as possible 24/7 is important BUT before mitigation most of most peoples daily nnEMF exposure is from inside their home, which is good in that this nnEMF can be controlled. AND it has been said that we are 10x (+/-) more sensitive to the effects of nnEMF after sunset ie at night while sleeping.

Measuring and mitigating your bedroom and establishing a nnEMF sleep sanctuary (turning off WiFi AND 60Hz (50Hz) AC house circuits that affect the sleep area) is the biggest “bang for the buck” when it comes to nnEMF mitigation. This alone can reduce daily nnEMF exposure by 70% (+/-).

**Grounding inside ≠ grounding outside**

Your body acts as an antenna and grounding makes you part of a circuit.
Outside this is you connecting your DC circuit to Nature’s DC circuit, natural DC energy flowing through you - VERY GOOD.
Inside, in a space permeated by a 60Hz (50Hz) AC energy field, is you giving that AC energy field (being picked up by your antenna/body) a path to ground THROUGH YOU - NOT so good.

ALSO keep in mind - houses in the USA have about 1.5 - 2 feet of Romex wire per square foot of space.
A 1,300ft house/apartment has 1/2 mile (+/-) of ground wire AND 1/2 mile (+/-) of neutral wire (which are ALL connected in the panel).
IF you connect to your house ground you are not only giving any AC field you are in a path to ground through you, you are also attaching yourself to a wire array “antenna” consisting of ONE MILE (+/-) of wire. In an apartment it could be multiple miles.

Think of birds on high power wires, they are ok because they are NOT grounded . . .
Do not be grounded in a 60Hz (50Hz) AC energy field.
**To ground in (to) Nature . . . You have to be in Nature.**

\- IF - you decide to ground inside . . . Turn off any AC fields you are in (you have to measure) and use an isolated ground wire into the dirt.

im going to guess none of these studies factored in blue light, nnemf and natural sunlight - so curious am I on the right track to pursue DHA via food and hopefully raw milk please ?

Ben

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/eclipse-eyewear.28755/post-333273>

Anyone had any experience viewing a solar eclipse without any protective eyewear? I remember seeing one in 2001 as a kid and I was wearing sunglasses. I never wear them anymore and realise the benefits of sunlight to the eyes, so this is why I'm thinking it might be nonsense. I'll be out for the eclipse on the 8th, not planning on staring directly at it anyway but yeah, would be keen to hear any experiences/opinions. I could only find 1 or 2 comments in old threads related to this. Cheers

### NikkiYork — 2024-04-05T20:30:11+0300

I never wear them anymore and realise the benefits of sunlight to the eyes, so this is why I'm thinking it might be nonsense. I'll be out for the eclipse on the 8th, not planning on staring directly at it anyway but yeah, would be keen to hear any experiences/opinions. I could only find 1 or 2 comments in old threads related to this. Cheers

The Arabs watch it inside the reflection of water. I’ve done it works great.
Take a big bowl of water and angle it, so you can see the sun in it. It doesn’t blind you at all and you see exactly where the eclipse is.
It becomes tricky when the wind starts (because it starts getting windy when the sun goes away).

# Thread: How do I go about it, in the US healthcare system?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-i-go-about-it-in-the-us-healthcare-system.28756/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### NikkiYork — 2024-04-05T20:49:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-i-go-about-it-in-the-us-healthcare-system.28756/post-333277>

Hi, I keep having issues particularly with the American healthcare system, because I don’t know which doctor to go to and who can help. I have PPO insurance, but it doesn’t seem to matter.

Right now I am having issues with my leg, can’t walk up stairs, or turn around in bed, all else no issue. It’s really not in the joint but below, and hasn’t subsided in 2.5 weeks.

First thing you google is, its osteoarthritis. That’s what the doctor came up with yesterday, after prescribing Mobic and ordering an x ray. Report says: joint pain.

I never said that. I honestly think it’s a vein issue and goes along with that shit I have for 3 years from the vax. Alternatively and I see that also, my dad says, the inner ligament could be inflamed. He’s in Spain, so he says it’s hard to tell via phone.

To exclude the latter, my Dad says, go have somebody inject an analgesic specifically into the ligament area- make sure they know where that is - and if the pain is gone, you know. If the pain is still there, go to the vein people.

I think it’s a good strategy, besides that I have been roasting in the sun, I am naked in the sun right now. Doesn’t seem to have much of an effect. I do red light, also not much of an effect.

For the fun of it: what really helped was getting smashed. I got incredibly drunk last Saturday and Sunday morning I was like, oh wow, half the pain, amazing. I suspect the blood thinning effect of alcohol did that. Sun is apparently not as strong. But I listen to Jack, no aspirin for clots… in case that’s what it is.

Anyhow.
How do I get a doctor to inject a numbing agent into my ligament?

Yesterdays doctor was just telling me, why would you have something with your veins? I don’t have an ultrasound. You need to go elsewhere.

It seems everybody just does all the tests they have available and then come up with a google fucking answer, that I already excluded, because nothing matches. Sorry, it’s annoying to me.

I am being polite and humble when I talk to doctors and they all say “get used to it, you are old”. The stupidest answer ever.

How do I get somebody to test for the ligament without doing mris or racking up the bill elsewise, it also takes so much time to sit around and wait for all this.

My easiest self answer is, tell everybody to fuck off and sit in the sun, which is what I’m doing. Maybe there is more. Thanks in advance.

# Thread: Luana's Enlightenment Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/luanas-enlightenment-journal.28757/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 21
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Luana Moraes — 2024-04-05T22:38:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/luanas-enlightenment-journal.28757/post-333285>

Hello everyone. I apologize if my English sounds strange, I'm Brazilian and I use Google Translate a lot because I have difficulty spelling words correctly. This is my open journal and I hope by writing on this forum I can see better what is happening to me. My location is 23.0S latitude in South America. I imagine my skin is Fitzpatrick type 1. Feel free to share information and thoughts.

**About Grandma:** My maternal lineage is directly Italian descent although I don't know what my mitochondrial haplotype is. She had a very difficult life from the beginning, losing her mother at the age of 5 and being separated from her siblings to live with distant relatives. At the age of 35, she became a widow with 4 young children and one in her womb and had to fight hard to provide for her family. Her youngest son was born with several facial malformations, with an open palate and Cleft Lip and Palate. My mother was her fourth child. **Nowadays:** 94 years old, 2 or 3 heart attacks, coronary artery bypass surgery, high blood pressure, insulin resistance, cataract removal in both eyes, regular bladder infections, high cholesterol, wide spread pain throughout the body and difficult to walk (up to 20 different medications or more)

**About my Mom**: I was born at eighth month gestation by c section and before I was born my mother had 1 or 2 miscarriages. In her youth she used to drink alcohol, smoke and party at night. And she gave birth to me when she was 27 years old in 1990. I was her first child and my brother was born 7 years later with cleft lips with a cleft on one side only. Early menopause at 38. **Nowadays:** 61 years old, metabolic syndrome, hashimotos, overweight (medications for blood pressure, cholesterol and diabetes)

**Me:** I was born and raised in Brazil where I still live today at the same latitude. Since I was very little (2/3 years old), I noticed that there was something wrong with me that was different from other kids of my age. I have always tended to introspection and uniqueness, I had difficulties making friends and adapting to different environments and people. Different experiences and situations have seemed to overwhelm me. I have always been highly sensitive to people, sounds, smells, textures and taste. I was a child who threw up a lot. I remember from an early age watching a lot of TV and doing a lot of activities indoors under artificial light.

I fell a lot and scraped my knees and elbows frequently, I never had good motor coordination. I didn't feel well doing physical exercise and sports that most children enjoyed, these activities were more than my body could handle. I always preferred to do things alone and I leaned towards art manifesting artistic skills at an early age.

**Prematurely I started losing my baby teeth at the age of 4 and my permanent teeth came in yellow!** (a long time ago I heard Jack saying that this is a sign of poor redox power). Other factor that may have influenced it, it seems that at the age of 2 I took an antibiotic from the tetracycline family. Then my brother had his permanent teeth yellow too. I had a **remarkable memory** at that phase and I remembered events in great detail and knew where everything was at home. And it was like that until I was 11/12 years old.

At school I wasn't bright, I had **difficulties learning** to read and do **calculations**. To this day, I have trouble telling the time on an analogue clock! It was always **difficult** for me **to concentrate** on explanations in the classroom although I paid attention, I was **unable to retain the knowledge** or make sense it and carry out the activities. When I studied alone at home I was usually able to understand better the content of the classes which was always a super exhausting process for me, I always **felt on edge** on my entire school life. My performance was slower than my peers and I had to try harder than everyone else and still not achieve a very good result.

The school where I studied for most of my life had blue light in the classrooms but also plenty of nature around, trees and vegetation and it was very well lit outside. In the second grade I developed **myopia** and started to have **itching and dandruff on my scalp** at the same age I got my first **computer** too. I didn't spend too much time on the PC, as I liked variety and was more involved with my art projects and dolls. In the fifth grade I started going to school in the morning instead of the afternoon and I did develop problems related to **spinal deviations**, which caused me pain and discomfort in pre puberty and puberty. I lived with a lot of **tension in my shoulders** (literally) due to worry about schoolwork, anxiety and difficulty sleeping. It was a constant burning sensation.

In my house, we had fluorescent lamps before other homes as well as the habit of sleeping late since I was a child which must have had a huge impact on my development. My parents' food choices for me weren't great either. My father was absent mostly of the time due to work and we went through several financial crisis because he was often unemployed. I spent most of my time with my mother, who was very critical and demanding. I went through a lot of psychological and emotional abuse until I was in my early 20s and left home. This experience with my mother caused me to have **C-PTSD**. I ended up growing a bit isolated from playing with other children because my mother was quite controlling and overprotective and wanted me to have minimal contact with the world outside her wings.

Going back to the chronological order of events, as a teenager I also had a lot of **acne** and underwent **dermatological treatments**, oral treatments with **antibiotics and topical treatments** (glycolic acid, retinoic acid) and, of course, **sunscreen!** I started showing symptoms of depression at the age 13 at same age that I went through **8 mercury fillings** that weren't really necessary (maybe just 1) which my mother encouraged me to do without anesthesia. I developed big hips just like her and was slightly overweight even before those “treatments” **(recently I discovered that I suffer from lipedema in my hips and thighs!)**. I started to have a lot of intolerance to the cold and an inability to maintain my temperature. Any liquid I drank caused me to **urinate excessively and disproportionately**. To this day I can't drink much water.

In my high school years, I woke up at least twice a night to urinate without having drunk anything. Feelings of **depression and anxiety** had already taken over me and I was finding it increasingly **difficult to sleep**. At the age of 17, I took **Accutane** and before the end of the treatment I started to notice **facial hair** that only got worse over time especially on my chin and remains to this day. At this point I had already realized how **shit** my **life** was, I turned myself to the **internet** to make friends online and in the following years I started using the computer a lot more what made my problems worse.

**At 18**, I went to college to study Biotechnology and only managed to do 3 of 5 years and I did very poorly. **I was a broken human being inside and out**, and I no longer had the ability to concentrate and stay in the classroom or meet the demands. My behavior become edge and I could no longer deal with anything. I **couldn't sleep at night anymore**, it was torture. I always ended up **switch day for night**. I had a **CRIPPLING** **anxiety**. Many remarkable events happened during these 3 years and an experience of acute stress triggered a **major depressive disorder** immediately after and so I ended up in the **psychiatrist's office**. From then on, I became increasingly **dysfunctional**. I tried **several medications**, effexor, almost all SSRIs, clonazepam, zolpidem. You name it. The final nail in the coffin was **Quetiapine**, **I gained weight out of nowhere** and was no longer able to work. **This happened 10 years ago and I was only 24 and I never recovered.**

This caused me a **_loss in my executive functions_** and my ability to form **short-term memories**. Studying and learning has never been easy for me, but I find it incredibly difficult now. It's hard to evolve when you forget what you learn and what you read. I have developed what I believe to be **chronic fatigue syndrome**/**fibromyalgia.** I have **profound** **fatigue** and I'm **tired all the time** that is not the result of ongoing excessive exertion, and is not substantially alleviated by rest, I can't do household chores. I experienced a substantial reduction or impairment in the ability to engage in preillness levels of occupational, educational, social, or personal activities, I have diffuse pain and heaviness all over my body even my facial muscles feel heavy. **I can't tolerate either cold or heat anymore**. My sleep is not refreshing because I **wake up feeling tired**. I can't exercise. All of this is accompanied by significant **cognitive impairment. Every time I try to expand my boundaries or step out of my comfort zone it causes me to burn out. No matter what I try this is the result.

Final considerations: _Damage to melanopsin and free vitamin A damaging photoreceptors; pseudohypoxia; no melanin renovation; membranes cannot form an appropriate dc electrical current; loss of electrons = low redox power; poor mitochondrial function; constantly dehydrated cells; leptin resistance_

Nowadays**: 33 years old, free from all medications, application of circadian principles has improved sleep and cognition, overweight, low progesterone and cortisol, low libido, lack of resilience to stressors, low energy and chronic fatigue, wide spread pain all over the body, issues with the formation of new short-term memories, high myopia and difficulties in socializing. Unable to work or do household chores.

I should focus on my morning sunlight routine (IR and UVA) to build on my melanin renovation. Block blue light as much as I can and use candlelight at night. Use my 1600K lamps only when absolutely necessary. Don't forget to eat my last meal before dark. Do not abuse of the technology use. Grounding more.

### Luana Moraes — 2024-04-08T20:34:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/luanas-enlightenment-journal.28757/post-333418>

Over the last 2 months I've started to be more consistent in watching the sunrise but throughout the day I feel completely depleted of energy. My bowel isn't working very well and I feel very drained. I can't move the needle and I feel absurd stress running through my body.

### Luana Moraes — 2024-04-09T23:01:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/luanas-enlightenment-journal.28757/post-333456>

> [Luana Moraes said:](/goto/post?id=333418)
>
> Over the last 2 months I've started to be more consistent in watching the sunrise but throughout the day I feel completely depleted of energy. My bowel isn't working very well and I feel very drained. I can't move the needle and I feel absurd stress running through my body.

Today I managed to leave the house in the morning to grounding on the soccer field near where I live. I felt the damp grass on my feet and the sun on my skin, I lay down on the grass with a towel underneath and there I stayed for approximately 1 hour. My day is going on significantly better today than in previous days. I was able to clean my cats' litter boxes and it wasn't torture for me. I have also noticed that I need to eat more, since I started to watch the sunrise frequently my appetite has been down regulated and I have been constantly feeling weaker.

Small wins every day can lead to big wins in the long term

The little color I can build fades easily in these areas. I believe this is the result of years of using the computer excessively.

### JanSz — 2024-04-13T16:04:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/luanas-enlightenment-journal.28757/post-333566>

> [Luana Moraes said:](/goto/post?id=333457)
>
> Hi Jack. I was reading the book Meditations by Marcus Aurelius this week and I couldn't help but notice the similarities between Stoicism and what you teach us. I think you're a Stoic philosopher and don't know it. Jack Kruse = Quantum Stoicism
>
> “Think of yourself as dead. You have lived your life. Now, take what's left and live it properly. What doesn't transmit light creates its own darkness.”
> ― Marcus Aurelius, [Meditations](https://www.goodreads.com/work/quotes/31010)

**Marcus Aurelius**, a Roman emperor and a Stoic philosopher.
The essence of this philosophy is to live in the present moment, to accept life as it is, and to strive for virtue and wisdom.

The phrase “What doesn’t transmit light creates its own darkness” is a metaphorical way of saying that what doesn’t bring positivity or clarity in life tends to create confusion or negativity. It’s a reminder to strive for **transparency, truth, and enlightenment** in our actions and thoughts.

Remember, **it’s never too late to make positive changes in your life.** Every moment presents a new opportunity to live better and to illuminate the world around us with our actions.
\=======================================
**Marcus Aurelius refers to free people.
People that were allowed to think and act on their thinking.
\=======================================**
In Tsar's time in Russia when village was sold it went with all the souls that lived there.
Souls=looks like people but really it is a property.

During the time of the Tsars in Russia, a system called serfdom was prevalent.
Under this system, peasants, known as serfs, were attached to the land they worked on.
These serfs were considered an unfree class of people, but unlike slaves, they could historically be sold only together with the land to which they were "attached".
This meant that if a village or a piece of land was sold, the serfs living and working on that land were sold along with it.
\=========================================

After WWII in Communist Poland, after 1945
there was a similar situation. I was facing it living there.
**People were assigned to the places they lived in.**

My parents, with unbelievable effort on their part, extremely poor, living in little village, send me to schools in big city where my mom's sister lived.
I finished high school and college there.
Most of the cost of college paid by company I contracted with.
After I graduated, I interviewed with number of companies, they would gladly hire me but couldn't because I was still assigned to the village my parents lived in.
So, I had to work for companies that would also pay for hotels they put me in.

It was not called serf, but that was my practical situation (in Communist Poland).

//////////////////////

Be careful seeing country describing themselves as Democratic.
Geek Aten were democracy (for the owners but not for slaves, servs, souls).
There are/were other similar places. Poland was just one of them.
///////////////////////////

**El Salvador**
is ran (now) by benevolent dictator.
He figured out that he needs 5000 "owners".

The rest trying to come in are given short leash.
There is a plenty of poor already there, no need for more.
....

> is ran (now) by benevolent dictator.
> He figured out that he needs 5000 "owners".
>
> The rest trying to come in are given short leash.
> There is a plenty of poor already there, no need for more.
> ....

Hi Jan, I saw the other day that you lived in Brazil in the seventies and worked on the construction project for the Angra dos Reis nuclear power plant. I appreciate that you shared a little bit of the story of your life with me. You and the people of your country faced enormous difficulties and I can't even imagine what it would be like to live in these times. But I think that nowadays we are affected mostly by another type of evil.

You mentioned the city of Athens in Ancient Greece that democracy only worked for the important people in society, this is true to some extent especially when we think about the rights of citizens and who could participate in the political decisions of the Greek polis. However a slave had a certain degree of freedom and autonomy, which was not as common elsewhere. The most important thing is that his owner did not control his thoughts and he could not be reprimanded for having them. A slave was free enough to pursue wisdom that **his soul desired**, this is clear in the case of Epictetus, another Stoic philosopher, who was born into slavery and lived in Roman times. Unlike to what happens today in so-called modern democracies and in my own country.

In fact the worst thing for me is the slave mentality described by Nietzsche as "slave morality" that is so prevalent today and has infected people's ability to think and act. People voluntarily choose servitude and don't even realize it, they still think it's a noble act and see virtue in weakness. At least a slave or servant in ancient times knew he was a slave/servant. Often the standards we set for our lives determine our failures and our successes and I see that many are unable to learn from their mistakes and the mistakes others make. Many spend their entire lives being a slave of their passions and desires without ever knowing themselves or controlling their impulses. They love what is bad for them and reject what is good deliberately or through ignorance choosing the bad into their lives. It's "okay" if the world is falling apart while people are entertained and ignorant. Now I'm wondering who is the true slave? **Their souls no longer seek wisdom.**

Slavery of the mind is the worst of all and the long-term consequences are worse than any dictatorship or anti-democratic form of government because it defeats the very act of fighting for individual sovereignty. Poland couldn't fight the totalitarian regimes that overpowered its territory in the 20th century but because the military power of other countries was far superior than its own, It wasn't due to a moral crisis in their society.

Salvadorians prior to this administration were not free at all, always under threat from the gangs that terrorized honest citizens. With this level of insecurity in a country, it is justifiable to establish a temporarily state of emergency and exchange some individual freedoms to reestablish the order. Here in Brazil, Bolsonaro tried to make changes following "the law" and achieved virtually nothing due to the extent of corruption installed in institutions of power in the country and he is still at risk of being arrested by these same institutions. I understand that the situation in El Salvador is a necessary step towards freedom and I see how in other situations this could be dangerous if a person with bad intentions took power.

### Luana Moraes — 2024-04-15T15:54:30+0300

When we get burned we shed the old skin to allow the new to come to the surface.

What is your nnEMF environment like? I have spent a lot of time in Brazil, and there is a lot of dirty electricity there due to shoddy building wiring. I believe many cities are rolling out 5G as well (depends on your location), and if you're in an apartment building, the numerous wifi networks around you are likely affecting your redox. Do you use your cell phone close to your body? Keep it on while you sleep? Etc. This is one area you didn't mention that is probably worth figuring out.

Your latitude suggests you might be in Rio or Sao Paulo (the picture looks to me like Zona Oeste in Rio). I would imagine both of these cities have a pretty big 5G infrastructure by now. It is probably not realistic for you to move at this time, but there are many things you can do to at least mitigate the effects of EMFs.

I have no firsthand experience with this but perhaps others have more knowledge in this area.

One thing I would advise is to go to this Substack and search for "Zeta potential", and read all of the articles that come up: [https://www.midwesterndoctor.com](https://www.midwesterndoctor.com).

Long story short, things that change the charge profile of your blood cells and therefore your blood's viscosity and propensity to clot have many negative health outcomes. In those articles are a few strategies for restoring cell zeta potential. It's a light/water/magnetism story just like everything else.

Find out your body fat % and BMI.

Homocysteine
fasting insulin and glucose
\----------------------------------

# Thread: Decentralized Hospitals
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decentralized-hospitals.28759/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Donny Blanco — 2024-04-06T02:24:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decentralized-hospitals.28759/post-333295>

Good Afternoon everyone. I am an RN and am currently in the process of doing a research project involving open windows that allow full-spectrum sunlight in the patient rooms. Any literature I've found on effects of sunlight on hospital stays was using sunlight through the windows; nothing involved actually opening the patient windows enough to see the effects of IR, UV light, etc. Where I work all patient windows are bolted shut, but I am working on getting that changed at least for some rooms to allow for this change. Any literature about hospital environments letting in full-spectrum sunlight is much appreciated. It seems this was utilized much more in the past, but our present-day set up is not conducive of nature reaching the patient. Also, is anybody familiar with any hospital architecture with the emphasis on nature and full-spectrum sunlight around the globe?

### JanSz — 2024-04-06T15:45:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decentralized-hospitals.28759/post-333302>

Look up pictures of mostly naked children exposed to sunlight.
Likely on dr Wunch website.

### Donny Blanco — 2024-08-05T00:06:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decentralized-hospitals.28759/post-338076>

Received a positive response on introducing full-spectrum sunlight into hospital patient rooms. My thought is only a portion of a window needs to be opened to allow for diffraction of light throughout the room. Currently hospital windows in higher floors are bolted shut, at least in these older buildings; any amount sunlight is better than what currently exists.

I don't think reducing nnEMF is plausible, but replacing blue LEDs and fluorescent bulbs with red bulbs at night might be doable with enough support.

### [Thread by @DrJackKruse on Thread Reader App](https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/1776818496032153937.html)

@DrJackKruse: If you have any skin disease that is associated with an altered immune response, do you know why the sun is your Rx for wellness? Did you know singlet oxygen is a potent trigger for...

 threadreaderapp.com

### doctorwu85 — 2024-04-10T01:49:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/parents-learn-why-the-sun-helps-your-kids-skin-you-ruined-with-your-beliefs.28765/post-333461>

Love having all of that information in one Twitter thread.

I posted this in my Optimal Journal, but we gave our newborn daughter a ton of summer sun last year and she had perfect tanned skin. Then, when the sun got weaker with the winter, she developed eczema on her feet and knees. We just finished 6 weeks at 27 north latitude and she got multiple hours of sun most days, and the eczema was reduced by about 80%, even in a slightly worse nnEMF environment. We also take her outside within 15 minutes of sunrise about 90% of the time.

She has never had a sunburn and we are Fitzpatrick 2 (or maybe even 1).

### CoachJPaulus — 2024-04-08T20:11:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tinnitus-and-inner-ear-health.28771/post-333413>

About 3 months ago I developed a swooshing Tinnitus in my left ear. Today, using an inner ear camera I carefully took some pictures. It's pretty cool in there... I discovered my ears are pretty clean, my ear drums are intact and each ear has what looks like a little white pustule behind the ear drum... I am guessing that is part of the inner ear. What I noticed, and you can see in the first photo, is that my ear with the Tinnitus (Left Ear) looks inflamed and irritated. I am wondering if anyone has any suggestions on healing the inner ear, calming the inflammation down, and soothing the sensitive skin there. I've read olive oil drops for a few days can help.
What say you?

RE: EMF and Sun Exposure: For years I've been a big audiobook listener and would wear Bluetooth headphones for about 2 hrs a day most days... while walking a mile to the gym, also while working out (about an hour), and walking home... I DO NOT hold my iPhone up to my head. I use speaker mode or my Bluetooth headphones. For longer scheduled calls I use wired headphones. For about a month I've been faithfully watching the sunrise and sunsets for Red Light exposure and get about 30 minutes of afternoon sun with about 90% coverage while my feet are grounded. Before that, I would get about 30 minutes of early-mid morning sun while walking back and forth to the gym.

# Thread: Zone 2 cardio
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/zone-2-cardio.28775/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Fitness
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Cicero106 — 2024-04-09T11:25:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/zone-2-cardio.28775/post-333442>

Hello guys, NEW member here. I know this has probably already been discussed, but if someone found the time and patience to enlighten me, I would be very grateful.
Growing up the only people I heard not recommending cardio were bodybuilders, because it ruins your gains. One year into carnivore I heard ”meatheads” like Bart Kay and Sean O’Mara explain how bad of a tool cardio is for fat loss (not why I want to do it) as well as improving cardiovascular fitness , and that in general it should be avoided because it raises colesterol and causes visceral fat accumulation.
Then I read how low intensity endurance training (for instance Zone 2 cardio) is beneficial for mitochondrial biogenesis, angiogenesis, myogenesis and neurogenesis and I thought to myself “Great, I discovered that I like jogging in nature at a comfortable pace that would allow me to conduct a conversation AND in addition it is great for my mitochondria, vessels etc.” I naively thought: “Dr. Kruse would for sure approve this!”
But as I was reading the Leptin Rx, I saw that he did not recommend it, also for people that were able to gain their LS back. Then reading the forum I found this post and that Dr. Kruse agreed with it: { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

Now, I ask myself: “Does this refer to high-intensity cardio for multiple hours, like someone would do trying to win an iron-man or marathon, or to any form of prolonged training? And is it false that low-int. training is great for mitochondrial biogenesis or do the ”side-effects” just outweigh the “benefits”?”

Again, I know it might be redundant for the veterans, but if someone with more experience on the forum or also more experience about this topic in general is willing to clarify and chat, it would be very appreciated.

PS: I also thought about our ancestors or the native americans and how I always assumed, that there were days where they would jog for hours hunting down a prey and that we are “endurance hunters” similar to wolves and dogs, thus designed to jog long distances.

### coho3131 — 2024-04-10T00:12:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/zone-2-cardio.28775/post-333458>

> [Cicero106 said:](/goto/post?id=333442)
>
> Hello guys, NEW member here. I know this has probably already been discussed, but if someone found the time and patience to enlighten me, I would be very grateful.
> Growing up the only people I heard not recommending cardio were bodybuilders, because it ruins your gains. One year into carnivore I heard ”meatheads” like Bart Kay and Sean O’Mara explain how bad of a tool cardio is for fat loss (not why I want to do it) as well as improving cardiovascular fitness , and that in general it should be avoided because it raises colesterol and causes visceral fat accumulation.
> Then I read how low intensity endurance training (for instance Zone 2 cardio) is beneficial for mitochondrial biogenesis, angiogenesis, myogenesis and neurogenesis and I thought to myself “Great, I discovered that I like jogging in nature at a comfortable pace that would allow me to conduct a conversation AND in addition it is great for my mitochondria, vessels etc.” I naively thought: “Dr. Kruse would for sure approve this!”
> But as I was reading the Leptin Rx, I saw that he did not recommend it, also for people that were able to gain their LS back. Then reading the forum I found this post and that Dr. Kruse agreed with it:[View attachment 27686](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/27686/)
>
> Now, I ask myself: “Does this refer to high-intensity cardio for multiple hours, like someone would do trying to win an iron-man or marathon, or to any form of prolonged training? And is it false that low-int. training is great for mitochondrial biogenesis or do the ”side-effects” just outweigh the “benefits”?”
>
> Again, I know it might be redundant for the veterans, but if someone with more experience on the forum or also more experience about this topic in general is willing to clarify and chat, it would be very appreciated.
>
>
>
> PS: I also thought about our ancestors or the native americans and how I always assumed, that there were days where they would jog for hours hunting down a prey and that we are “endurance hunters” similar to wolves and dogs, thus designed to jog long distances.

I am not convinced humans ran long distances to hunt.

I think this might be more of a mainstream argument that was created to support the endurance running industry.

I think it is more likely that humans used intellectual tactics and sprinted short distances to hunt.

Endurance training can have consequences unless you have an optimal redox state and excellent mitochondrial health.

When you read the blogs, you might agree.

Endurance running can be satisfying emotionally, but I think there are healthier ways to exercise.

I have converted to mostly walking with occasional sprinting intervals after my heart rate returns to baseline.

### eve001 — 2024-08-10T13:35:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/zone-2-cardio.28775/post-338251>

Running makes an awful lot of noise. Even walking makes lots of noise. You can't hunt like that. Wild animals hear you and run away. So sneaking and crawling very silently and slowly - to me - seem much more appropiate for hunting, whereas running seems - to me - more propper to fleeing!  Many sports have something martial about them - which is a thing quite different from hunting to feed your stomach. Try to run or even walk silently in wild nature! It's hard.

My mom lived with us her last 25 years.
Died 95 yo, end of March 2005 (flu season).
Looks like she had flu or cold.
But otherwise had she survived that flu, she might have been still living.
Overloaded with fluids.
So, I think she died of ARDS.
On her own legs she got to car, and I took her to ER.
She died in Emergency Room some hours latter.

She would ALWAYS do right away anything that I ever asked her for.
**Are you saying that she should have taken cold shower?
She had a personal shower next to her room. I build it just for her.**

I did in the beginning. So started out, just doing 30seconds of cold at the end of my shower. I couldn't breathe it was so uncomfortable. Now I can do a whole 5min shower in cold from start to finish and feel great. Build up your tolerance slowly. I was also getting in my pool during the winter about 3 times a week for 5min at a time. It was at 55degrees. I tried to get closer to 10min a few times at started to shiver, and thats when I know it's time to get out. The high dopamine levels provide such positive feeling and energy level that lasts for hours.
From what I learned from Jacks protocol, 55 degrees is the magic number and any lower doesn't necessarily provide extra benefits.

# Thread: Help with CIRS/Actinomycetes
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 13
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### TaylorF — 2024-04-10T22:26:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/post-333490>

Hello everyone,

I'm looking for some advice.

I am still struggling with my CIRS/Mold journey, and most recently, my apartment tested extremely positive for actinomycetes. The DO I see has a protocol for ridding the apartment of Actinos, so I am willing to put in the effort. However, I am still struggling with brain fog, histamine issues, muscle and joint pain, chronic EBV/viruses, POTS, panic/nervousness/agoraphobia, and I have an allergy to shellfish.

I would say if I started this illness at a 1/10, I am now at a 6.5/10. So, I've made huge improvements in many areas with functional and integrative medicine support. However, I have about 100 lbs to lose and I am really struggling mentally with that fact. I weigh 250 and I need to be around 150 for my height and muscle mass. Most recently, I got to the point mentally where i decided to try Ozempic, and ended up in the hospital with severe stomach pain and nausea -- I never wanted to take it, I've listened to Jack talk about it, but it was almost a last hope weight-wise.

Most recently I was in a fairly remote part of Mexico and I didn't feel any relief. The sun and swimming felt truly amazing, but anytime I went inside or ate any food I was symptomatic. I also experienced low blood pressure and blood sugar whenever I was outside for a touch too long, even with shade.

I'm feeling really overwhelmed and looking for any and all advice you can all give me to get from my 6.5/10 to a true 10/10 - great health like I used to have.

Thanks in advance,
Taylor

### Anthony Smith — 2024-04-10T23:24:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/post-333493>

Mold reacts to nnEMF by growing faster so one thing to do is minimize the nnEMF in your home. Turn off WiFi and keep as many of the electrical circuits off as much as you can, especially at night. My wife lost 75+lb with intermittent fasting, she does not watch what she eats but only has one meal a day . . . we are all different but it worked for her.

### JanSz — 2024-04-11T00:14:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/post-333496>

Move out from that place.
If you do not want
get one or two dehumidifiers.

### Jack Kruse — 2024-04-11T03:07:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/post-333497>

Moving is the only answer.

### TaylorF — 2024-04-11T03:19:47+0300

### Joseph LeBlanc — 2024-04-11T16:51:32+0300

### TaylorF — 2024-04-11T20:54:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/post-333522>

I think there is a place for all types of medicine when healing from a 9 year chronic illness, even if integrative medicine is 10% and being a black swan mitochondriac is 90%, like Jack said in the Maria Menounos podcast about acute medicine. A lot of sun, avoiding nnEMF, and healthy RO or mountain valley water has gotten me to a great point from a 0 out of 10 to a 6.5ish, along with mold binders, and following a biotixin protocol. I know light, water, and magnestism in at the 20th latitude will get me to a 10/10, but i currently have $500 in my savings account, and only $500 in bitcoin. Working is essential right now, and I need to ride out my lease, so I'm trying to work with what I have on Long Island. I'm working on a Ramsey Solutions protocol for saving, and then when I get to step 7 (skipping buying a house) I plan to purchase bitcoin with the 3 month of expenses savings.

I just purchased _Prescriptions for A Healthy House by Paula Baker-Laporte and John Banta (4th edition)_ which was recommended to me by my CIRS provider. Working on the actinos will bring my TGF-Beta down which he said is still high. Summer up here is often by best time of year, though I do get depressed from the lack of relationships that I have during the school year.

TGF-B is associated with a lot psychological symptoms, I also have a fatty liver with some fibrosis which they say can also be from TGF-B, so I'm hoping that working on Actinos will bring some relief as it seems to be highly associated with Actinos toxicity.

### JanSz — 2024-04-11T21:57:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/help-with-cirs-actinomycetes.28779/post-333526>

> [TaylorF said:](/goto/post?id=333522)
>
> I think there is a place for all types of medicine when healing from a 9 year chronic illness, even if integrative medicine is 10% and being a black swan mitochondriac is 90%, like Jack said in the Maria Menounos podcast about acute medicine. A lot of sun, avoiding nnEMF, and healthy RO or mountain valley water has gotten me to a great point from a 0 out of 10 to a 6.5ish, along with mold binders, and following a biotixin protocol. I know light, water, and magnestism in at the 20th latitude will get me to a 10/10, but i currently have $500 in my savings account, and only $500 in bitcoin. Working is essential right now, and I need to ride out my lease, so I'm trying to work with what I have on Long Island. I'm working on a Ramsey Solutions protocol for saving, and then when I get to step 7 (skipping buying a house) I plan to purchase bitcoin with the 3 month of expenses savings.
>
> I just purchased _Prescriptions for A Healthy House by Paula Baker-Laporte and John Banta (4th edition)_ which was recommended to me by my CIRS provider. Working on the actinos will bring my TGF-Beta down which he said is still high. Summer up here is often by best time of year, though I do get depressed from the lack of relationships that I have during the school year.
>
> TGF-B is associated with a lot psychological symptoms, I also have a fatty liver with some fibrosis which they say can also be from TGF-B, so I'm hoping that working on Actinos will bring some relief as it seems to be highly associated with Actinos toxicity.

> so I'm trying to work with what I have on Long Island.

Long Island have lots of places where ground water is very high.
Everywhere it is high, but if you live in any of the red places,
you should have a more than one humidity gauge, and make sure those gauges newer show more than about 30% humidity. Get enough de-humidifiers. How many of them you need, consult those gauges.

Many "good" homes are built over plastic sheets to prevent water incoming to the basements or first floors.
After years of use, when that plastic breaks, the owner of that place get surprise.

[USGS Scientific Investigations Map 3326: Water-Table and Potentiometric-Surface Altitudes in the Upper Glacial, Magothy, and Lloyd Aquifers beneath Long Island, New York, April-May 2010](https://pubs.usgs.gov/sim/3326/)

### [Long Island, New York, Depth to Water Table Map | Land Imaging Report Site](https://eros.usgs.gov/doi-remote-sensing-activities/2015/usgs/long-island-new-york-depth-water-table-map)

The USGS, in cooperation with State and local agencies, systematically collects groundwater data at varying measurement frequencies to monitor hydrologic conditions on Long Island, New York. Each year during April and May, the USGS conducts a synoptic survey of water levels to define the spatial...

# Thread: AGING AND LONGEVITY = DAMP hypothesis has replaced the ROS hypothesis.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/aging-and-longevity-damp-hypothesis-has-replaced-the-ros-hypothesis.28780/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2024-04-11T05:40:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/aging-and-longevity-damp-hypothesis-has-replaced-the-ros-hypothesis.28780/post-333503>

Lessons in Longevity: Aging isn’t driven by ROS. Many now think it is driven by the DAMP Program. I believe sunlight controls all the DAMP molecules

Aging and cancer share some common origins and hallmarks, such as genomic instability. Sunlight exposure creates genomic stability to quiet epigenetic programming and lower protein turnover in cells.

Recent advances indicate that damage-associated molecular pattern molecules (DAMPs) such as high mobility group box 1, histones, S100, and heat shock proteins play location-dependent roles inside and outside the cell.

These provide interaction platforms at molecular levels linked to common hallmarks of ageing and cancer. They can act as inducers, sensors, and mediators of stress through individual plasma membrane receptors, intracellular recognition receptors (e.g., advanced glycosylation end product-specific receptors, AIM2-like receptors, RIG-I-like receptors, and NOD1-like receptors, and toll-like receptors), or following endocytic uptake. Thus, the DAMP Hypothesis is novel and complements other theories that explain the features of ageing. DAMPs represent ideal biomarkers of ageing and provide an attractive target for interventions in ageing and age-associated diseases. DAMP phenotype = a loss of energy at the electronic level in the cell.

### Jack Kruse — 2024-04-17T16:46:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/aging-and-longevity-damp-hypothesis-has-replaced-the-ros-hypothesis.28780/post-333700>
